steps.title: Infer from Davis's work
steps.content: Davis had to listen repeatedly to unclear vinyl recordings in order to transcribe Rainey and Smith's improvised lyrics. That effort suggests reliable written versions of those improvised lyrics were not already available to her.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported comparisons
steps.content: A discusses popularity over time, which the passage never mentions. B compares the number of recordings by the two singers, which is also unsupported. D claims Davis judged one singer more musically innovative, but the passage does not make that comparison. The supported inference concerns missing reliable transcriptions. The answer is C.
